rag_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use only visible component ports and features in type scope contracts
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in contracts
Relate outputs to inputs in dependency guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in type scope contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
